message:
fix(repro_dedup_bug): clear tail_buffer before re-detection to avoid overlap masking

Anchor-only rules produce a Detection at the overlap position in the
tail_buffer, which gets filtered out even though the text reappears in
the new segment. Clearing the tail_buffer before the post-TTL detection
avoids this false suppression. Also increased TTL margins (50ms/100ms)
for loaded systems.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
